Build-Depends-Arch: cargo:native, rustc:native (>= 1.88), libstd-rust-dev, librust-abscissa-core-0.9+default-dev, librust-cargo-lock-11+default-dev, librust-clap-4+default-dev, librust-display-error-chain-0.2+default-dev, librust-home-0.5+default-dev, librust-object+read-dev (<< 0.40), librust-object+read-dev (>= 0.36), librust-rustc-demangle-0.1+default-dev, librust-rustsec-0.33+binary-scanning-dev, librust-rustsec-0.33+default-dev, librust-rustsec-0.33+dependency-tree-dev, librust-serde-1+default-dev, librust-serde-1+serde-derive-dev, librust-serde-json-1+default-dev, librust-syn-2+default-dev, librust-syn-2+extra-traits-dev, librust-thiserror-2+default-dev
